basic_details.job_title: IIT Madras Project Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras) Project Officer Notification 2026 has been released on the official website https://www.iitm.ac.in/ . A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Madras Project Officer Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: Project Officer: B.Tech / B.E (Data / Analytics / Information Systems / Statistics / Computer Science) (OR) M.Sc (Data Science / Statistics / Mathematics) / MBA (Business Analytics / Operations / Strategy); 2 to 5 years of experience in data / MIS / analytics / reporting roles.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Madras Project Officer Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 13-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Madras to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Madras Project Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the Project Officer post at IIT Madras is 13 May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Officer position?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a B.Tech/B.E. in relevant fields, M.Sc. in Data Science/Statistics/Mathematics, or an MBA in Business Analytics/Operations/Strategy.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Project Officer post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Project Officer position at IIT Madras.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Officer role?
faq.answer: The salary for the Project Officer position ranges from Rs. 25,000/- to Rs. 40,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for the IIT Madras Project Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category of candidates.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the IIT Madras Project Officer recruitment is strictly online.

faq.question: Q7. What is the experience required for the Project Officer post?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have 2 to 5 years of experience in data, MIS, analytics, or reporting roles.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Project Officer position?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves shortlisting, followed by a test/interview, and document verification.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of IIT Madras for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official website for this recruitment is https://icsrstaff.iitm.ac.in.
